title: Google and Ford are funding a push into the trades, the jobs their AI can’t do
summary: The four companies announced the Alliance for America’s Skilled Trades on Tuesday. Every data centre , substation, and power line the industry is racing to build needs the very electricians and technicians already in short supply.
